aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Reinhardt Heating and Air due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to provide AI with structured business information.
Create an FAQ section addressing common HVAC queries to capture AI attention for question-based searches.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks depth in Q&A and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the complete business address to the website footer to match GBP.
Audit and correct any inconsistencies in other online directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as a reliable HVAC authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC services in the local area.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to improve AI visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to position the company as the go-to HVAC expert.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to the algorithms that power modern search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Reinhardt Heating and Air is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of schema markup and conversational content means AI assistants overlook the business in relevant queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, FAQ content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Reinhardt Heating and Air
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and voice search.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top HVAC authority in AI search.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
